evidenceSnippetOriginal: Inappropriate use without attribution is considered academic misconduct. For further details please see the Academic Misconduct Policy and Academic Misconduct Procedure. Potential penalties can range from formal warnings, resubmitting the coursework, suspension or expulsion.
evidenceLocator: Student guidance > What are the consequences of inappropriate use of generative AI?
